headline: Is Charter Communications (CHTR) Using Spectrum’s Google TV Expansion To Reinforce Its Broadband-Centric Strategy?
summary: Earlier this month, Charter Communications announced that its Spectrum TV App is now available on Google TV and other Android TV OS devices running Android 10 for TV or later, extending free access for Spectrum TV customers to live TV, Multiview for select sports, Cloud DVR and On Demand content across major smart TV brands. This expansion deepens Spectrum’s presence on third‑party platforms and could strengthen the pull of its bundled video and broadband offering as viewing options shift...
